sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52701" key="kallipe/dilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καλλῐ-πέδῑλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52701.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with beautiful sandals,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
